scripts.build: node scripts/sync-project-config.js && node scripts/fix-cms-image-paths.js && node scripts/normalize-project-frontmatter.js && rm -rf _site && eleventy && node scripts/publish-build-outputs.js
scripts.dev:cms: node scripts/sync-project-config.js && node scripts/sync-cms-local-config.js && npx concurrently -k "decap-server" "eleventy --serve --watch"
